description: Agent coordination manifest - claims prevent conflicts

changes: Move module-level imports out of hot functions
Pre-compile regex patterns at module load time
Remove redundant list() copies in cache returns
Optimize sensitive_path_reason_optimized with LRU-style caching
performance_notes: Import inside function adds ~4% overhead per call

changes: Added _find_fork_bomb_unescaped() for escaped fork bomb detection
Extended _DANGEROUS_ENV_VARS to include dyld_library_path
Enhanced _blocked_curl_wget() for silent fetch detection
Fixed dangerous env var detection for PATH= anywhere
Added _blocked_sudo_n() to block sudo -n and sudo -E
security_notes: Fork bomb bypass via escapes now detected

changes: Added session_start/session_end event logging
Added agent_id parameter to log_tool_call()
Added policy_change audit event type
Added ensure_session_start_logged()
audit_improvements: Session lifecycle now has explicit audit events

changes: Added success_criteria_json parameter to create_plan()
Added validate_plan() function for plan validation
Added critique_plan() function for plan scoring
Added TypedDict classes PlanValidationResult and PlanCritiqueResult
Added relevance scoring in explore_approaches()
Added _score_keyword_match() helper
Added include_low_relevance filter parameter
planning_improvements: Plans now support explicit success criteria
validate_plan() checks goal length, step descriptions, success criteria
critique_plan() provides 0-100 scoring with issues and suggestions
Approach exploration uses weighted scoring (70% relevance, 30% complexity)

changes: Add error_handling criterion
Add imports criterion
Add type_coverage criterion
Added _SYNONYM_MAP for keyword variant detection
Added _INTENT_PATTERNS for regex-based intent detection
Added _STORE_DIR_CACHE with invalidate_store_dir_cache() for caching
Enhanced _detect_keywords() to use synonyms and intent patterns
Added count validation (0 < count <= 20) to prevent infinite loops
Added relevance scoring with _score_keyword_match()
Added include_low_relevance parameter to explore_approaches()
Added TestSynonymDetection test class
Added TestIntentPatternDetection test class
Added TestEdgeCases test class for boundary conditions
explorer_improvements: Synonym detection: sorting->sort, find->search, performance->optimize, etc.
Store dir caching reduces repeated filesystem calls
Relevance scoring ranks approaches by keyword frequency

changes: Added compact, benchmark, platform to SUPPORTED_WORKFLOW_MODES for consistency
Added missing PROMPT_ARGUMENTS entries for compact, benchmark, platform workflows
Added missing PROMPT_FOCUS_ARG mappings for compact, benchmark, platform
Added compact, benchmark, platform to WORKFLOW_STEPS
Added compact, benchmark, platform to WORKFLOW_EXAMPLES
Added missing compact, benchmark, platform to WORKFLOW_DISCOVERY_TERMS
Added missing compact, benchmark, platform to WORKFLOW_DEFAULT_FOCUS
Added compact, benchmark, platform to WORKFLOW_PROMPT_TEMPLATES
Improved optimize template with concrete low-risk improvement guidance
Improved debug template with hypothesis-driven approach
Added ToolMetadata class with name, description, version, read_only, destructive, open_world, tags
Added version and tags parameters to ToolRegistrationContext.register()
Added default_version configurable on ToolRegistrationContext
Added get_metadata() and get_all_metadata() methods for discovery
Added tool_version and tool_tags parameters to register_smart_tools()
tool_improvements: ToolMetadata provides structured metadata for each registered tool
Discovery methods allow runtime tool introspection
